commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc '
python3 - <<"PY"
import json, subprocess, urllib.request
from pathlib import Path
print("ENV_URL=" + Path("/opt/election/.env").read_text(encoding="utf-8").split("RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL=",1)[1].splitlines()[0])
raw = subprocess.check_output(["aws","s3","cp","s3://ch7-static-bkkelection2569/api-data/master-data/election-areas-bangkok.json","-"], text=True)
payload = json.loads(raw)
print("S3_TOP_TYPE=" + type(payload).__name__)
if isinstance(payload, dict):
    print("S3_KEYS=" + ",".join(sorted(payload.keys())[:10]))
    data = payload.get("data")
    print("S3_DATA_TYPE=" + type(data).__name__)
    if isinstance(data, list):
        print("S3_DATA_LEN=" + str(len(data)))
    elif isinstance(data, dict):
        print("S3_DATA_KEYS=" + ",".join(sorted(data.keys())[:10]))
        areas = data.get("electionAreas") or data.get("districts") or data.get("items")
        print("S3_AREAS_TYPE=" + type(areas).__name__)
        if isinstance(areas, list):
            print("S3_AREAS_LEN=" + str(len(areas)))
resp = urllib.request.urlopen("http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/v1/governor-results/districts?fresh=1")
body = json.loads(resp.read().decode())
consts = (((body.get("data") or {}).get("constituencies")) or [])
print("API_CONST_LEN=" + str(len(consts)))
print("API_GENERATED_AT=" + str(body.get("generatedAt")))
PY'
